Anthropic | News

Introducing contextual retrieval

Standard RAG pipelines lose important context when chunks are embedded in isolation.

We introduce a technique we call contextual retrieval, which prepends a chunk-specific summary before embedding.

Results

  • BM25 alone: 5.7% retrieval failure
  • Contextual BM25 + embeddings: 1.9% retrieval failure

Implementation

def contextualize(chunk, doc):
    return prompt + chunk

See the cookbook for end-to-end examples.
